Home Hockey

Hockey Lockers

THE LOCKER ROOM

OUR LOCKERS

Premium Wood Locker Collection
6 Models Available | Quick Ship & Custom Options | 2-12 Week Delivery | Lifetime Warranty | Free Consultation

Choose from 6 premium wood locker models designed specifically for athletic teams. Our collection ranges from the essential Semi Pro and Varsity models perfect for high school teams, to our elite Pro, Stadium, Elite, and Legendary models built for collegiate and professional facilities. Every locker features premium 6-layer melamine-faced plywood construction with superior moisture resistance and fire-rated materials. Quick ship models (Stadium & Elite) deliver in 2-4 weeks, while fully custom lockers ship in 8-12 weeks with your choice of dimensions, finishes, colors, and hardware. All backed by our lifetime warranty on wood construction and 5-year materials guarantee.

Semi Pro

$349.00

View Details

Varsity

$449.00

View Details

Pro

$549.00

View Details

Elite

$599.00

Legendary

$599.00

View Details

THE LOCKER ROOM

READY TO UPGRADE YOUR HOCKEY LOCKER ROOM?

Custom Hockey Storage Solutions
Skates | Sticks | Helmets | Pads | Gloves | Goalie Gear | Jerseys | Shin Guards | Equipment Drying

Custom hockey locker room solutions designed for professional and collegiate teams. Our wood athletic lockers provide organized storage for all your hockey equipment including skates, sticks, helmets, pads, gloves, goalie gear, jerseys, and protective equipment. With 30+ years of experience building team locker rooms across the United States and Canada, we specialize in custom hockey storage systems that keep your practice equipment, training gear, and game day essentials organized and accessible. From high school hockey teams to professional NHL facilities, our hockey lockers are built to handle everything from Bauer skates to CCM sticks, Warrior gloves to Vaughn goalie pads. Expert hockey locker room design with equipment drying features, installation, and customization. Free consultation, lifetime warranty on wood construction, 5-year warranty on all materials. Serving teams nationwide with custom wood lockers, team storage solutions, and complete locker room renovations.

Get Hockey Locker Quote
HOCKEY

Powerful Sports Theme

Rule the Ice

"You miss 100% of the shots you don't take."

— Wayne Gretzky

"A good hockey player plays where the puck is. A great hockey player plays where the puck is going to be."

— Wayne Gretzky

"Hockey is a unique sport in the sense that you need each and every guy helping each other and pulling in the same direction to be successful."

— Wayne Gretzky

PlayerStall

Luxury custom-built wood lockers with full color options. Quick ship in one month (24" & 30" widths) or custom-built in three months. 50% deposit to begin. 30+ years of craftsmanship.
